'''Saloch²''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Jiroch-Saloch]].<ref name="Fry">{{EmailCite|email=File:AtlasEmail-2025-07-31.png|author=[[Jason Fry]]|date=2025-07-31}}</ref> It supported a [[Tunroth]] colony that was [[Battle of Saloch|freed]] from the [[Lortan]]s by forces of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], led by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Lun Tessra]] and the ''[[Abrogator]]''.

{{Loc-stub}}
